title: For the Soul of Rafael
writer: Marah Ellis Ryan, Dorothy Yost, Charles E. Whittaker
actors: Clara Kimball Young, Bertram Grassby, Eugenie Besserer
plot: Marta Estevan is ready to leave the convent where she has been reared. Dona Luisa Artega, mother of Rafael and the young girl's guardian, arranges a marriage between the two, because she thinks that Marta's influence will rescue her
